scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,admin,backend -c cyan,magenta,green "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd admin && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm i && cd ../admin && npm i && cd ../backend && npm i
scripts.setup:db: cd backend && node src/database/migrate.js && node src/database/seed.js
